title: Shift Handover Protocol for Hotel Operations
trigger: End of shift requiring handover to the next team

steps.title: Preparation for Handover
steps.action: Ensure all guest requests and issues are documented in the PMS. Verify that all financial transactions are closed and logged. Prepare a summary of the shift activities, including occupancy rate, ADR, and any notable incidents.

steps.title: Conduct Handover Meeting
steps.action: Meet with the incoming shift team to discuss the shift summary. Highlight any pending guest requests, maintenance issues, and VIP arrivals. Ensure all team members understand their roles for the upcoming shift.

steps.title: Update Communication Boards
steps.action: Update the communication boards with key information such as occupancy rate, ADR, and any special events. Ensure all team members have access to this information.

steps.title: Verify Handover Completion
steps.action: Confirm with the incoming shift that all necessary information has been communicated. Address any questions or concerns they may have. Document the completion of the handover in the shift log.

steps.title: Escalate Unresolved Issues
steps.action: If there are unresolved issues, escalate them to the Operations Manager. Provide a detailed report of the issue and any actions taken so far.

description: This playbook outlines the standard procedures for conducting a shift handover in hotel operations, ensuring continuity and efficiency in guest services.
prerequisites: Familiarity with the Property Management System (PMS)
